closedcaptions.portal.00_part1_entry-1: <clr:219,112,147><I>Hello and, again, welcome to the Aperture Science computer-aided enrichment center.
closedcaptions.portal.00_part1_entry-2: <clr:219,112,147><I>We hope your brief detention in the relaxation vault has been a pleasant one.
closedcaptions.portal.00_part1_entry-3: <clr:219,112,147><I>Your specimen has been processed and we are now ready to begin the test proper.
closedcaptions.portal.00_part1_entry-4: <clr:219,112,147><I>Before we start, however, keep in mind that although fun and learning are the primary goals of all enrichment center activities, serious injuries may occur.
closedcaptions.portal.00_part1_entry-5: <clr:219,112,147><I>For your own safety and the safety of others, please refrain from touching [bzzzzzt]
closedcaptions.portal.00_part1_entry-6: <clr:219,112,147><I>Por favor bordón de fallar Muchos gracias de fallar gracias
closedcaptions.portal.00_part1_entry-7: <clr:219,112,147><I>stand back. The portal will open in three. two. one.
